description: Chatwoot is an open-source customer support platform for managing conversations across website chat, email, social, messaging, and other channels. It is available as a cloud service or self-hosted software and includes tools for inbox management, automation, help centers, and agent workflows.
summary: Chatwoot exposes three REST API surfaces—Application API, Platform API, and public Client API—plus a `chatwoot` CLI; no GraphQL or MCP server surfaced in the public docs.
